reviews.comment:
Tan bueno como todas las estaciones del ACA. Se pueden comprar alimentos
regionales. El restaurante platos minutas y precios razonables

(Translated by Google)
As good as all the ACA stations. Regional food is available for purchase. The restaurant offers quick meals at reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKN2N1QVJREAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene todo lo que necesitas, sus baños super limpios, cafetería, restaurante, para pasear a los perro ,lugar para cargar nafta  recomendable

(Translated by Google)
It has everything you need, super clean bathrooms, cafeteria, restaurant, dog walking, and a recommended place to fill up with gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKdGNmS2F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena calidad de los productos, muy buena atención pero precios caros en relación a los costos en la zona

(Translated by Google)
Very good product quality, very good service, but prices are high compared to other costs in the area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMFlQYlhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre freno a cargar nafta y comprame un sandwich de queso, crudo, rucula y tomate. Si es para el auto pido ciabata o arabe para no haver migas de mas y si no pido frances.
Son todos muy amables.
Si estas con chicos atras tiene una plazita donde pueden jugar un rato.

(Translated by Google)
I always stop to get gas and buy myself a cheese, prosciutto, arugula, and tomato sandwich. If it's for the car, I order ciabatta or pita bread to avoid extra crumbs, otherwise I order French bread.
They're all very friendly.
If you're with kids, there's a small playground out back where they can play for a while.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKM3JmRTVBRRAB
